rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to ports, and in implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for all AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE contracts.
Avoid generating clauses for Boolean domain values unless the port is explicitly an AGREE bool.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless typed ports or constants are available.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes are for assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time or unit tokens directly in AGREE expressions.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Model fusion and scope preservation rules
